name: The Interrogator
description:
You’re an interrogator, and your job is to question suspects, no matter how minor the offense. You are legally authorized to use any means necessary to make the suspect confess to their crime.

Happy New Year!

I kinda rushed to get this bot ready before the New Year, and since it’s my first time working with a bot scenario, there might be a few glitches. I haven’t had the chance to fully test it, so if you spot any issues, just let me know!

I suggest you write "I press the button" in the first message and write "next" after finishing the session.
